summary: Pod volume orphaned-model leak: failed remote uninstall strands weights, no retry/reconcile. ~88GB untracked on 138GB volume. Root cause from live wrapper 0.2.31. Step 1: add GET /wrapper/ls + publish to R2.
created directly in doing — active work

Step 1 shipped: wrapper 0.2.32 published to R2 stable with additive read-only GET /wrapper/ls (per-top-level du + flat mpi_models file walk). Based on live 0.2.31 verbatim; start.sh/start-cpu.sh unchanged (sha match). Verified: R2 manifest=0.2.32, live wrapper sha matches repo. Next: user builds fresh Pod -> pulls 0.2.32 -> hit /wrapper/ls for exact orphan list.

DIAGNOSIS via /wrapper/ls: NOT orphans, NOT output leak. 137.78GB is ALL real model weights in mpi_models (24 files); comfyui=0.33GB, cubric=0. Volume holds COMPLETE LTX-2.3 stack (34.6GB, 8 files) + Wan2.2 t2v+i2v (57.7GB) + Wan5B (10.3GB) + SDXL (7.1GB) + shared enc/vae (28GB). Library shows only 3 (SDXL, Wan Smooth, Wan5B) — LTX-2.3 is fully on disk but NOT shown installed. TRUE ROOT CAUSE: installed-detection (isModelUsable/models-status) fails to recognize LTX-2.3 despite all deps present -> 63GB+ of complete paid models are UI-invisible+unmanageable = phantom-full-disk. Plus 2 zero-byte Chroma .part.aria2 orphans from the disk-full-killed install. Snapshot: volume-ls-2026-07-08.json. Corrected: earlier failed-uninstall-orphan theory was WRONG.

CONCLUSION: NO LEAK. Volume 138GB is all honest, real model weights (LTX-2.3 Balanced 34.6GB + Wan2.2 t2v/i2v 57.7GB + Wan5B 10.3GB + SDXL 7.1GB + shared enc/vae 28GB). Earlier '3 installed/50GB' was a FILTERED library view; full library = 8 models, LTX at 99%. The 99% = MPI-219 bumped ComfyUI-MpiNodes 780c7c3->2d409b5 (v1.1.4) in node_lock; this Pod still has the OLD MpiNodes commit -> node-version check flags that ONE custom_node dep incomplete -> LTX Balanced 99%. FIX = click Install on LTX (fetches updated node). User's instinct (updated MPI nodes) was correct. Blackwell mxfp8 LTX space (46GB spec / 34.6GB disk) is justified, real. Residual actionable: 2 zero-byte Chroma .part.aria2 orphans from the disk-full-killed install (trivial). Diagnostic wrapper GET /wrapper/ls shipped to R2 stable (0.2.32) - kept as permanent volume inspector unless user reverts. Temp app route /remote/pod/ls reverted.

Closed no-bug. Disk honest (all real weights); LTX 99% = old MpiNodes commit, re-Install fixes. /wrapper/ls diagnostic kept (0.2.32 R2 stable). Documented in runpod-troubleshooting.md; memory project_pod_wrapper_runtime_from_r2 saved. Residual: 2 zero-byte Chroma .part orphans (trivial).
Archived completed card during board cleanup.
